merged_prs.title: Update GenProton NanoAOD acceptance for Run 3
add a unit test for `hltDiff`
re-organization of HGCal local reconstruction HLT products, add unseeded EGamma GSF tracks to FEVTHLT

[DAQ] update DTH tests and drop file locking
Make CalibPPS ESSources concurrent capable
LST updates to handle "pixel tracks" with OT hits
[TrackerGeometry]Fix nvcc warings: type qualifier on return type is meaningless
Prevent the MPI modules from `throw`ing upon race conditions or hanging at the end of a run.
Phase2-hgx367K Update the testing code for neighour searches of HGCal silicon cells
Move to EventSetupRecordInfiniteIntervalFinder
Bug fix in Phase2 Tracker Digitizer in cross talk calculation
Phase2-hgx367H Update the new scenario D128 to use I21 for MTD instead of I22
LST: add LSTGeometry package and associated ESProducer
`runHLTTiming`: improve logging of error keywords found in benchmark jobs
[WarningFix]:CondCore/CondHDF5ESSource- avoids dead store in zstd dec
Disabling GEN-SIM recycling for pre Run4 wfs
Remove Run 3 PU GPU workflows
Protect isMergeable() from types with no dictionary
Add test for Pythia8ConcurrentHadronizerFilter
Removed FWLiteESSource

Fix SciTag values
Drop Geometry/CommonDetUnit package

Remove unnecessary use of imp
Make Lumi ESSources concurrent capable
update Sherpack name with SCRAM_ARCH and CMSSW_VERSION
Adding `skipEvents` option to `cmsDriver`
Fix TICLDumper Configuration
re-activate Phase2 HLT timing script, using samples produced in `CMSSW_20_0_0_pre1`
